title: prunus pleiocerasus
intro: Prunus pleiocerasus, also known as the Chinese plum or Chinese cherry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Prunus pleiocerasus include reducing fever, relieving cough and respiratory issues, and promoting digestion. The herbal preparations of Prunus pleiocerasus include tea, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used to make medicinal concoctions or as a dietary supplement.
